name: Falling Maple Leaves
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: several maple and oak leaves of different shapes drifting and tumbling through the air, each leaf showing its pointed lobes and branching veins, a couple already resting on the ground below

name: Fall Pumpkin
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a plump round pumpkin with deep curved ribs, a short sturdy stem on top, and a curling vine with two small leaves trailing off to one side, sitting on the ground

name: Friendly Fall Scarecrow
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a cheerful scarecrow with a round patched face and a button smile, a floppy straw hat, straw poking out of its sleeves and collar, arms stretched out on a wooden post, standing in a field with a few cornstalks

name: Basket of Fall Apples
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a woven wicker basket overflowing with round ripe apples, each with a small stem and leaf, a couple of apples resting on the ground in front, set on a grassy patch

name: Acorn and Oak Leaf
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: two plump acorns with textured caps resting beside a large lobed oak leaf with clear veins, a tiny twig connecting them, simple and close-up

name: Squirrel Gathering Acorns
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a fluffy-tailed squirrel sitting up on its hind legs holding a large acorn in its little paws, a bushy curved tail behind it, a few more acorns and fallen leaves scattered on the ground around it

name: Cute Fall Leaf
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: one big simple maple leaf with a happy smiling face, thick rounded lobes and a short stem, very few inner lines, friendly and easy for a toddler to color

name: Pumpkin Patch Scene
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a pumpkin patch with several pumpkins of different sizes sitting among curling vines and broad leaves, a small wooden fence and a barn in the background, a few birds in the sky

name: Cornucopia Harvest
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a woven horn-shaped cornucopia tipped on its side spilling out pumpkins, apples, grapes, corn, and autumn leaves across a table, full and abundant

name: Colorful Fall Tree
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a tall leafy tree with a rounded canopy full of layered leaves, several leaves drifting down from the branches, a sturdy trunk, and a small pile of fallen leaves gathering at its base

name: Cozy Mug and Leaves
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a chunky mug of hot cocoa with little steam curls rising and a marshmallow on top, a small knitted scarf wrapped at its base, two or three autumn leaves resting beside it on a table

name: Hedgehog in the Leaves
subject: holidays/fall
prompt: a cute round hedgehog with a spiky back nestled in a pile of fallen leaves, a tiny nose and happy eyes, a few leaves stuck to its spines, a mushroom and an acorn beside it
